subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Suratu'l-Qadar I
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath brought into being, through His command, whatsoever is in the heavens and on earth, and beyond them those who have believed in God and His signs - these shall verily be gathered unto Him. And praise be to God Who hath originated the essences, not from aught that existed before them, through their own causation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی ابدع ما فی السموات و الارض بامره ثم الذین آمنوا بالله و آیاته فاولئک هم الی الله یحشرون و الحمد لله الذی ابتدع الجوهریات لا من شیئ قبلها بعلیة نفسها
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @infinity and eternity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @Word of God and human limitations
